title: Care Hospital Appointment Booking System

requirements.text: Implement a sticky glassmorphism header with the CARE HOSPITAL logo (icon + text) on the left, navigation links (Home, About, Doctors, Departments, Book Appointment, Contact) in the center/right, and Login, Register, and Emergency (highlighted red) buttons on the right. Include a mobile hamburger menu that opens a smooth slide-in drawer.
acceptanceCriteria: Header remains fixed at the top while scrolling
Glassmorphism effect (frosted glass background) is visible on the navbar
Logo with hospital icon and 'CARE HOSPITAL' text appears on the left
All 6 nav links render and scroll/navigate to their respective sections
Login and Register buttons are visible on desktop
Emergency button is highlighted in red
On mobile, a hamburger icon appears and opens an animated slide-in drawer menu

requirements.text: Build an animated hero section with the headline 'Your Health, Our Priority', subtext 'Book appointments with top doctors instantly.', two CTA buttons ('Book Appointment' primary and 'View Doctors' secondary), and a doctor/hospital illustration image on the right side. Use Framer Motion for entrance animations.
acceptanceCriteria: Headline and subtext render prominently on the left
Both CTA buttons are present and functional (scroll to respective sections)
A doctor/hospital illustration image is displayed on the right side
Entrance animations play on page load using Framer Motion
Section is fully responsive (stacks vertically on mobile)

requirements.text: Create a Doctors section with a 3-column grid (responsive) displaying doctor cards. Each card shows a doctor photo, name, specialization, years of experience, star rating display, and a 'Book Now' button. Include at least 6 sample doctors with varied specializations.
acceptanceCriteria: At least 6 doctor cards are displayed in a 3-column grid on desktop
Each card shows photo, name, specialization, experience, star rating, and Book Now button
Grid collapses to 2 columns on tablet and 1 column on mobile
Cards have soft shadows and rounded corners
Hover effects are visible on each card

requirements.text: Build a Departments section with animated hover cards for: Cardiology, Neurology, Orthopedics, Pediatrics, Dermatology, and General Medicine. Each card should include a relevant icon and animate on hover using Framer Motion.
acceptanceCriteria: All 6 departments are displayed as cards with icons
Hover animation is applied to each card
Cards are arranged in a responsive grid
Each card displays the department name and a relevant medical icon

requirements.text: Implement an appointment booking form section with fields: Patient Name, Email, Phone, Select Doctor (dropdown), Select Department (dropdown), Date Picker, and Time Slot selector. Include client-side field validation and display a success message upon valid form submission. Store submitted appointments in the backend.

quotes: Form should: Validate fields, Show success message

acceptanceCriteria: All 7 form fields are present and functional
Client-side validation highlights missing or invalid fields
A success confirmation message is shown after valid submission
Doctor and Department dropdowns are populated with available options
Date picker prevents selection of past dates
Submitted appointments are persisted in the backend
Form resets after successful submission

requirements.text: Add a Features section displaying 4 animated feature cards: '24/7 Emergency Support', 'Experienced Doctors', 'Online Reports', and 'Easy Appointment Booking'. Each card should include a relevant icon and a brief description, with Framer Motion animations on scroll.
acceptanceCriteria: All 4 feature cards are displayed in a responsive grid
Each card has an icon, title, and short description
Scroll-triggered entrance animations are applied via Framer Motion
Cards have consistent styling with soft shadows and rounded corners

requirements.text: Build a Contact section with a Google Maps iframe embed showing a sample hospital location, contact details (address, phone, email, working hours), and a quick contact form with Name, Email, and Message fields.
acceptanceCriteria: A Google Maps iframe is embedded showing a placeholder hospital location
Contact details (address, phone, email, working hours) are displayed
A contact form with Name, Email, and Message fields is present
Section is responsive and displays correctly on all screen sizes

requirements.text: Create a professional multi-column footer with a dark blue background and white text. Include 4 columns: (1) About Hospital with links for About Us, Our Services, Careers, Blog; (2) Quick Links for Book Appointment, Find Doctor, Departments, Emergency; (3) Contact Info with address, phone, email, working hours; (4) Social Media icons for Facebook, Instagram, Twitter, LinkedIn. Include a bottom bar with '© 2026 CARE HOSPITAL. All Rights Reserved.' and Privacy Policy / Terms & Conditions links.

quotes: Dark blue background with white text

acceptanceCriteria: Footer has a dark blue background with white text
All 4 columns are present with correct content
Social media icons are visible and styled
Bottom bar shows copyright text and policy links
Footer collapses gracefully on mobile (stacked columns)

requirements.text: Apply a consistent medical design theme across the entire application: white, blue, and light green gradient color palette; Poppins or Inter font; soft shadows and rounded cards; smooth hover effects on interactive elements; and fully mobile-first responsive layout with no overflow issues.

quotes: Clean medical theme (White + Blue + Light Green gradient)
Professional UI like Apollo / Practo websites

acceptanceCriteria: White, blue, and light green gradient palette is used consistently throughout
Poppins or Inter font is applied globally
All cards and containers use soft shadows and rounded corners
Hover effects are present on all interactive elements
No horizontal overflow issues on any screen size
Layout is properly spaced and readable on mobile, tablet, and desktop

requirements.text: Implement a Motoko backend actor to store and retrieve appointment bookings. The actor should expose functions to: submit a new appointment (with patient name, email, phone, doctor, department, date, time slot), retrieve all appointments, and retrieve appointments by email.
acceptanceCriteria: submitAppointment function accepts all required booking fields and stores the record
getAppointments function returns all stored appointments
getAppointmentsByEmail function returns appointments matching a given email
Appointments are persisted across canister upgrades using stable storage

constraints: Backend must use Motoko (single actor) — Python backend is not supported on this platform
Do not edit any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui
Google Maps embed must use a static iframe (no Maps JavaScript API key required)
nonGoals: User authentication / login system (Login/Register buttons are UI only)
SMS or email notification on booking

required: Professional medical illustration showing a friendly doctor in a white coat with a stethoscope, standing next to a hospital building, clean flat-style vector art with blue and light green tones (hero-doctor.dim_600x500.png)
CARE HOSPITAL circular logo icon with a red cross medical symbol and teal/blue color scheme, flat minimal design (care-hospital-logo.dim_128x128.png)
